title: Amtech M1605 5 Piece metal jigsaw blade set (AMT118A)
features: FOR CUTTING SHEET METAL: This jigsaw blade set is made from high speed steel with 21 teeth per inch (TPI) and is designed for cutting sheet metal (1mm-3mm)
STRAIGHT, FINE CUT: With a T-Shank fitting, the blades are 75mm in length and provide a straight and fine cut
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 5Pc Metal Jigsaw Blade Set See more
